env._note_headless: Set to true for CI/CD environments

autotestgen._note: Custom MCP server with high-level tools (mcp_oidc_login, mcp_capture_page_dom, mcp_save_storage_state, mcp_extract_routes, mcp_probe_conditional, mcp_pom_mine_locators). One call per tool replaces 8-15 playwright primitive calls — cuts token use ~85% and survives session/rate limits.

_readme: • playwright   — standard @playwright/mcp primitives (browser_navigate, browser_evaluate, etc.) — runs from local node_modules, no download at startup
• autotestgen  — high-level tools that wrap multi-step browser work (see autotestgen-mcp/README.md)
Both servers use the system-installed Chrome (preferred) or Edge — no Chromium download required.
Place this file at: .vscode/mcp.json in your workspace root, or symlink it.
Prerequisites: Node.js 18+, Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge installed on this machine.
